# France Vitamine C — llms.txt
# AI-readable site description for language model discoverability
# https://llmstxt.org/

> France Vitamine C is a French specialist in pure and natural vitamin C products.
> The company offers pharmaceutical-grade L-ascorbic acid powder, organic superfruits
> (acerola, sea buckthorn, camu-camu), and liposomal vitamin C capsules.
> All products are manufactured in Europe to the highest quality standards.

## Brand Identity
- **Brand Name**: France Vitamine C
- **Website**: https://www.francevitaminec.com
- **Founded**: 2026
- **Country**: France
- **Industry**: Dietary supplements, Vitamin C specialist
- **Certifications**: European Pharmaceutical Quality, Organic (AB/EU Organic), Vegan, Gluten-Free, Non-GMO

## Product Catalog

### Poudre Pure de Vitamine C (Pure Vitamin C Powder)
- **Type**: Powder
- **Active**: 100% L(+) Ascorbic Acid, pharmaceutical grade
- **Purity**: 99.7%
- **Origin**: European manufacturing (DSM Quality)
- **Variants**: 250g (€24), 500g (€39), 1kg (€69)
- **URL**: /produit-vitamine-c.html

### Poudre Bio d'Acérola (Organic Acerola Powder)
- **Type**: Powder
- **Active**: Organic acerola fruit powder, 17-25% natural vitamin C
- **Origin**: Brazil, certified organic
- **Variants**: 100g (€18), 250g (€39), 50Og (€69)
- **URL**: /produit-acerola.html

### Poudre Bio d'Argousier (Organic Sea Buckthorn Powder)
- **Type**: Powder
- **Active**: Organic sea buckthorn berry powder, rich in vitamin C and omega-7
- **Origin**: Europe, certified organic
- **Variants**: 100g (€29), 250g (€49), 500g (€79)
- **URL**: /produit-argousier.html

### Poudre Bio de Camu-Camu (Organic Camu-Camu Powder)
- **Type**: Powder
- **Active**: Organic camu-camu fruit powder, world record vitamin C content
- **Origin**: Peruvian Amazon, certified organic
- **Variants**: 100g (€24,90), 250g (€47), 500g (€74)
- **URL**: /produit-camu-camu.html

### Gélules de Vitamine C Liposomale (Liposomal Vitamin C Capsules)
- **Type**: Capsules
- **Active**: Liposomal vitamin C, 500mg per capsule
- **Technology**: Liposomal encapsulation for enhanced absorption
- **Origin**: Made in France
- **Variants**: 60 capsules (€39), 240 capsules (€129)
- **URL**: /produit-liposomale.html

## Site Structure
- **Home**: / or /index.html
- **Shop**: /boutique.html
- **Product Pages**: /produit-{slug}.html
- **About**: /a-propos.html
- **Info/Blog**: /info.html
- **Delivery**: /livraison.html
- **Cart**: /panier.html
- **Legal**: /cgv.html, /mentions-legales.html, /confidentialite.html

## Languages Supported
French (fr), English (en), German (de), Italian (it), Spanish (es), Arabic (ar), Chinese (zh)

## Technical Architecture
- **Front-end**: Static HTML/CSS/JS on Cloudflare Pages
- **Back-office**: WordPress (headless CMS) on IONOS
- **API**: WordPress REST API / WooCommerce REST API
- **Cart**: Client-side localStorage
- **CDN**: Cloudflare
